final_response: Hello! How can I help you today? If you’d like to create an account, place an order, track shipping, or modify an order, just let me know what you need.

hits.title: How do I create an Aura Electronics account?
hits.summary: Customers can create an account by visiting our website and clicking 'Sign Up' in the top right corner. An account allows users to track orders, register warranties, and initiate returns. Guest checkout is available, but guest orders cannot be viewed in the online order history.

hits.title: What are your shipping options and timelines?
hits.summary: We offer three shipping tiers. Standard Shipping: 5-7 business days. Free on orders over $50. ($5.99 for orders under $50). Expedited Shipping: 2-3 business days. Flat rate of $14.99. Overnight Shipping: Next business day (if ordered before 2:00 PM EST). Flat rate of $29.99.

hits.title: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
hits.summary: Shipping addresses can only be modified within 1 hour of placing the order. Once an order status changes to 'Processing', the address cannot be changed. Customers must use the carrier's tracking portal to request a package redirect (fees may apply).
